description_long: This is a military-style SUV with a boxy, angular body painted in matte dark green, giving it a rugged and utilitarian appearance. The vehicle features four large, solid black wheels and a spare tire mounted on the rear right side. The open-top design exposes two front seats and a rear compartment, with a mounted machine gun on a roll bar above the front seats, suggesting a tactical or patrol function. The front end is characterized by a flat hood and a simple, robust grille, while the rear is squared off with minimal detailing. The doors are flat and flush with the body, and the overall construction appears to prioritize durability and function over comfort or aesthetics. The SUV's design is reminiscent of military or off-road vehicles used in urban patrols or rugged environments.
description: A matte dark green, open-top, military-style SUV with four black wheels, a rear-mounted spare tire, and a mounted machine gun above the front seats.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat hood, simple grille, and open cabin with visible front seats and mounted gun.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the boxy body, two doors, spare tire on the rear, and the mounted gun above the cabin.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the squared-off back, spare tire, and open rear compartment.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the angular body, two doors, and mounted gun.
attribute_wheel_design: solid black wheels with no visible spokes or decorative patterns
